---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Hugo Trad"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Hugo Trad — Assistant Professor, behavioural science."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/cv">
---

# CV {.hero__name}

A condensed timeline. The full PDF is below; please request the latest version by email if you need it for review.

```{=html}
<p class="hero__links" style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
  <a href="../assets/cv.pdf">Download CV (PDF)</a>
  <span style="color:var(--bs-secondary);font-size:0.85rem;">— placeholder until Hugo provides the file</span>
</p>
```

## Positions

```{=html}
<ul class="timeline">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2025 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Assistant Professor of Behavioural Science &amp; Organizational Behavior</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique · Rabat, Morocco</span>
    </div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Occasional collaborator on sludge methodology</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">OECD Behavioural Insights team · informal</span>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

## Education

```{=html}
<ul class="timeline">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2024</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>PhD, Cognitive Science</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">École normale supérieure · Institut Jean Nicod · Paris</span>
      <span class="timeline__sub"><em>The War on Sludge: Uncovering the Cognitive Roots of Administrative Complexity</em></span>
    </div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">—</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>MSc, Cognitive Science (Cogmaster)</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">ENS · EHESS · Université Paris Cité</span>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

## Selected service

```{=html}
<ul class="timeline">
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Methodology consultant</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">OECD · sludge audit framework</span>
    </div>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
    <div class="timeline__body">
      <strong>Behavioural-science consulting</strong>
      <span class="timeline__sub">National agencies and private-sector engagements (selected; details on request)</span>
    </div>
  </li>
</ul>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Awaiting full CV from Hugo.** This page is a placeholder skeleton; once the file is dropped into `assets/cv.pdf` and the timeline is populated, this becomes the canonical version.
:::
